properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v8 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh I'd like to go back To that old country church To hear the songs of praise How the people would sing It would make the rafters ring At that old, at that old country church

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Shall we gather at the river The beautiful, the beautiful river Gather with the saints at the river That flows from the throne of God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh I'll never forget At that old country church How the glory of the Lord came down And the children would smile As they shouted down the aisle Of that old, of that old country church

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the sweet by and by We shall meet on that beautiful shore In the sweet by and by We shall meet on that beautiful shore

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Then on Sunday I'd see All my friends dear to me At that old country church When we'd kneel down to prayer Everybody would be there At that old country church

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Leaning (leaning), leaning (I'm leaning) Safe and secure from all alarm Leaning (leaning, leaning), leaning (I'm leaning) Leaning on the everlasting arm

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Now the years have gone by And so many have died At that old country church But they're on the other shore Where they'll sing forever more As they did at that old country church

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I'm redeemed (Oh, I'm redeemed) by Love Divine (by Love Divine) Oh glory, glory (Christ is mine) Christ is mine (Christ is mine) Oh to Him (Oh to Him) I now resign (I now resign) (I have been) I have been redeemed

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I'm redeemed (Oh, I'm redeemed) by Love Divine (by Love Divine) Oh glory, glory (Hallelujah) Christ is mine (Christ is mine) Oh to Him (Oh to Him) I now resign (I now resign) (I have been) I have been redeemed At that old country church

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: I'm redeemed (Oh, I'm redeemed) by Love Divine (by Love Divine) Oh glory, glory (Christ is mine) Christ is mine (Christ is mine) Oh to Him (Oh to Him) I now resign (I now resign) (I have been) I have been redeemed At that old country church
